cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top candidates were selected based on their high scores and alignment with the most frequent digits per position from historical data. The top5 are the strongest scoring numbers and are included in the top50 list, which contains the highest scoring 50 unique candidates from the shortlist.
